name: David Cates
background: Mr. Cates is the President and Chief Executive Officer of Denison and serves on the Board of Directors. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant (CPA, CA) and holds a Master of Accounting (MAcc) and a Bachelor of Arts (BA) degree from the University of Waterloo. Prior to his appointment as President and CEO, he served as Denison's Vice President Finance and Chief Financial Officer.
